title: AI Implementation Consulting
description: Fractional CTO services and strategic AI implementation to eliminate operational chaos.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const o={em:"em",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return t(e,{children:[n(o.h2,{children:"Premier AI Consulting Services"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"As a Fractional CTO and AI Implementation Consultant, I work directly with founders and leadership teams to identify operational bottlenecks and solve them using cutting-edge artificial intelligence."}),"
",t(o.p,{children:["My philosophy is simple: ",n(o.strong,{children:"No new software to learn—just pure efficiency."})," I build resilient architectures that run seamlessly in the background, connecting your existing tools and processes to powerful LLMs and automation platforms."]}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"What We Deliver"}),"
",t(o.ol,{children:["
",t(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Strategic Auditing:"})," A comprehensive review of your current workflows, software stack, and operational pain points."]}),"
",t(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Custom AI Architecture:"})," Designing bespoke solutions using models like OpenAI, Anthropic, or local open-source models, orchestrated via robust platforms like n8n or Make.com."]}),"
",t(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"End-to-End Implementation:"})," I do not just advise; I build. From initial proof-of-concept to full production deployment, I handle the technical heavy lifting."]}),"
",t(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Security & Compliance:"})," Ensuring that your data remains private and your automated systems are highly secure and fault-tolerant."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Who Is This For?"}),"
",t(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Scaling teams hitting operational ceilings."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Businesses overwhelmed by manual data entry, customer support triage, or complex CRM management."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Companies looking to gain a competitive edge by leveraging AI without hiring a full-time, highly expensive engineering team."}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:n(o.em,{children:"Ready to scale? Book a strategy call today."})})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: N8N Workflow Automation
description: Custom, self-hosted multi-step automations connecting your tools to eliminate repetitive tasks while keeping costs transparent and data secure.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const a={h2:"h2",h3:"h3",p:"p",...o.components};return n(e,{children:[t(a.h2,{children:"What tools do you work with for automation?"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:"Using N8N, I synchronize data between hundreds of applications, from Google Workspace and Microsoft 365, to specialized CRMs, accounting tools like QuickBooks, and internal databases. If it has an API, we can automate it."}),"
",t(a.h3,{children:"Why choose self-hosted N8N over Zapier or Make?"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:'Zapier charges premium prices per "zap" or per task. As your operations scale, your fixed costs explode. By using self-hosted N8N, Famous Sheamus Consulting ensures your automation workflow scales without increasing monthly task costs. Your data remains completely under your control, ensuring maximum intellectual property protection.'}),"
",t(a.h2,{children:"Can these workflows handle social media?"}),"
",t(a.p,{children:"Absolutely. We build custom Social Media Engines that autonomously craft and post high-quality content directly to LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook. It’s not just posting—it’s intelligent interaction, engaging with industry trends automatically."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Voice AI Receptionist
description: AI-powered voice receptionist optimized for Home Services. Handles calls 24/7, books appointments, and qualifies leads based on your specific rules.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const i={h2:"h2",h3:"h3",p:"p",...o.components};return n(e,{children:[t(i.h2,{children:"What types of tasks can this AI Receptionist automate?"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"Our Voice AI Receptionist completely removes the burden of administrative call management from your technicians. Whether you're a plumber, electrician, or HVAC professional, the receptionist handles initial contact, screens out solicitors, and intelligently schedules appointments based on calendar availability."}),"
",t(i.h3,{children:"How does the integration with Jobber or ServiceTitan work?"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"We establish a secure API connection between our AI Voice agent and your existing CRMs like Jobber or ServiceTitan. Without you lifting a finger, customer details, call transcripts, and appointment block reservations are logged directly into the software you already use."}),"
",t(i.h2,{children:"How much does automation typically cost?"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"A self-hosted voice AI agent is a fraction of the cost of hiring a 24/7 human dispatcher. Due to our custom integrations, we charge an upfront setup fee plus a low, predictable monthly maintenance rate based on call volume, completely eliminating high hourly wages and unexpected overtime."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
